---
description: 'Files in docs/ are synced from the Epupp repository and must not be edited directly. Use when: editing documentation, updating docs, syncing docs, or planning doc changes.'
---

# Synced Documentation

Files in `docs/` are synced from the [Epupp repository](https://github.com/PEZ/epupp) via `bb docs-sync`. They are read-only copies.

- **Never edit these files directly** - changes will be overwritten on next sync.
- **Edit the source** in the Epupp repo instead (e.g., `README.md` for `docs/epupp-README.md`).
- When asked to update documentation that lives in `docs/`, identify the source file in the Epupp repo and edit there.
